CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GIS_Proximity_IP when the async GIS proximity check has completed and proximity results have been written to nepa_protection_areas__c, nepa_gis_last_checked__c, and nepa_extraordinary_circumstances__c. NEPA_CE_Screener reads this flag before evaluating extraordinary circumstances — if false, the screener defers the GIS stage and routes to manual review rather than assuming no proximity. Reset to false when nepa_location_lat__c or nepa_location_lon__c changes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checked automatically when the GIS proximity analysis is complete. Do not edit manually — managed by the GIS Proximity flow.
CustomField.label: GIS Proximity Check Complete
